candidate_definition_hints.text: [CVPR 2021 Best Student Paper Honorable Mention, Oral] Official PyTorch code for ClipBERT, an efficient framework for end-to-end learning on image-text and video-text tasks.
[Less is More: ClipBERT for Video-and-Language Learning via Sparse Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2102.06183)
